title: node_server.py/renode_server.py: simulation driver swallows exceptions
description:
Files: python/src/lichen/sim/node_server.py (lines 135-149), python/src/lichen/sim/renode_server.py (lines 136-151)

Both _simulation_driver methods only catch CancelledError:

    async def _simulation_driver(self) -> None:
        try:
            while True:
                self._simulation.deliver_pending_packets()
                self._simulation.maybe_advance_time()
                await asyncio.sleep(0.001)
        except asyncio.CancelledError:
            pass

If deliver_pending_packets() or maybe_advance_time() raises an exception (e.g., from a callback), the task crashes and the exception is lost. In node_server.py, _ensure_simulation_driver() restarts the task, but the original exception is never logged.

Should catch Exception, log it, and continue (or re-raise for testing).

Impact: Debugging simulation issues is difficult; callbacks that raise kill the driver silently.
notes: Commit: 61bac62e1. Fix already present in _simulation_driver() methods (logger.exception + re-raise). Empty commit to mark completion per instructions. Rebase conflicts in .beads/ prevented clean push; requires manual resolution.
close_reason: Fixed: simulation driver now logs exceptions via logger.exception before re-raising. Code was already updated matching the recommendation.
